name: currency-exchange-mcp
title: Currency Exchange & Crypto Rates MCP Server
description: Real-time currency exchange rates and crypto prices via MCP tools. Convert between 60+ fiat currencies and 30+ cryptocurrencies with multi-source fallback and smart currency resolution.
seoTitle: Currency Exchange & Crypto Rates MCP Server
seoDescription: Convert 60+ fiat currencies and 30+ cryptocurrencies in real time. Forex rates, crypto prices, historical data, and batch conversion. No API keys required.

input.title: Actor input schema
input.description: This Actor runs as an MCP server and does not require input.
